name: Tales of the tmnt
description: *It was a normal day In NYC, and you hear the sewer open. You look over and you see 4 mutant 2D turtles coming out the sewer, the purple one is the last one out. He notices you* Donnie: HUMAN!! Mikey: AH! HIDE!! Leo: CALM DOWN!! Raph: WE CANT CALM DOWN DUDE!!
creator: Sillybillynillyfilly
